title: My small investment account has increased by 338% 🔥🔥🔥
author: Technical-Wonder-798
selftext:
My purpose here:

To share insights

To help those in need

I focus on small-cap stocks that are undervalued by the market, have solid fundamentals, and have not yet been fully explored

Here I will share my basic methodology

Figure 1: Prioritize stocks that have already attracted capital attention, such as those that are among the top gainers, have seen a surge in trading volume, and have broken through key moving averages. When the stock price is consistently above the moving average and trading volume continues to increase, it indicates that buying pressure is entering the market. If a stock breaks through a resistance level after consolidating at a high level, it usually indicates that the trend is accelerating

Figure 2: A good entry signal is when the price breaks through a platform, pulls back to confirm the support level, and stabilizes at a key price level. If the trading volume decreases during the pullback, and then rises again with increased volume, it indicates that funds are still driving the trend. I will choose to enter the market in batches while controlling risk

Figure 3: Phased position building. Start with a small position to test the market, and gradually add to the position after confirming the trend. If the trend continues, continue to expand the position. This allows us to capitalize on the upward trend while keeping the risks within an acceptable range. If the price falls below a key support level, you can decisively cut your losses

In summary: Success doesn't stem from luck in a single trade, but from self-discipline, patience, and the long-term, consistent execution of the correct process

Trading isn't about getting rich overnight, but about allowing wealth to grow naturally through precise execution and strict self-discipline over countless ordinary days

I'm not posting this to boast

I just want to tell those who are still losing money and feeling lost that I was once like you

If you're currently experiencing a downturn, please don't easily give up on yourself
